brief_html: Sent to clients supporting this packet when an entry is removed from the client's friendlist. The first friend is Entry number 0. Accounts positioned after the specified Entry number in the friendlist are moved up by one.
remarks_html:
Sent to clients supporting this packet when an entry is removed from the client's friendlist. The first friend is Entry number 0. Accounts positioned after the specified Entry number in the friendlist are moved up by one.

Usually requested with the chat command /friend remove.

See [SID_FRIENDSLIST] for more information.
